      Optional method to have the device perform some identifying action, such as flashing a light or playing a sound.
      void leaveSoftApNetwork(android.content.Context context, java.lang.String softApSsid, int previousWifiNetworkId, SoftApService.InternetConnectionCallback callback)
      Disconnects from the soft ap network and rejoins previous network to reconnect to the internet.
      void putPrivateCredentialsViaSoftAp(boolean isHiddenNetwork, int previousWifiNetworkId, int priority, android.content.Context context, java.lang.String softApSsid, com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.net.model.WiFiNetwork selectedNetwork, java.lang.String preSharedKey, SoftApService.SoftApCredentialsSenderCallback callback, com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.CommonErrorCallback errorCallback)
      Sends credentials via Soft AP and starts to check joining status to see if the device has successfully joined the private network.
      SoftApService setProgressView(com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.CirrentProgressView customProgressView)
      This method allows to set a custom progress view that will be shown during requests execution.
      SoftApService setSoftApConnectTimings(int softApConnectDelay, int softApConnectMaxRetryCount)
      This method changes the number of retries and the delay between retries (in seconds) when user's phone/tablet tries to connect to device via Soft AP.
      SoftApService setSoftApDeviceStatusTimings(int softApDeviceStatusDelay, int softApDeviceStatusMaxRequestCount)
      This method changes the number of retries and the delay between retries (in seconds) when user's phone/tablet checks device joining status via Soft AP.
      SoftApService setSoftApDisconnectTimings(int softApDisconnectDelay, int softApDisconnectMaxRetryCount)
      This method changes the number of retries and the delay between retries (in seconds) when user's phone/tablet tries to disconnect from Soft AP device network.
      SoftApService setSoftApPort(int port)
      This method changes default SoftAP port.

      • SoftApService

        public SoftApService()

    • Method Detail

      • cancelAllTasks

        public void cancelAllTasks()
        This method cancels all running requests.

      • connectToDeviceViaSoftAp

        public void connectToDeviceViaSoftAp(boolean suppressSmartSwitchWarning,
                                     @NonNull
                                     android.content.Context context,
                                     @NonNull
                                     java.lang.String softApSsid,
                                     @NonNull
                                     SoftApService.SoftApDeviceConnectionCallback callback)
        Connects to device via SoftAP wifi network being broadcast by the device.
        Parameters:
        suppressSmartSwitchWarning - "true" if you want to skip Smart Network/Smart Switch checking. Smart Network/Smart Switch feature switches your phone to the mobile network to prevent routing data to Wi-Fi network that does not have Internet
        context - Application context.
        softApSsid - Soft AP SSID to which you want to connect.
        callback - SoftApService.SoftApDeviceConnectionCallback
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - Will be thrown in case when incorrect parameter is passed.

      • getDeviceInfoViaSoftAp

        public void getDeviceInfoViaSoftAp(@NonNull
                                   android.content.Context context,
                                   @NonNull
                                   SoftApService.SoftApDeviceInfoCallback callback,
                                   @NonNull
                                   com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.CommonErrorCallback errorCallback)
        Gathers device info via Soft AP.
        Parameters:
        context - Application context.
        callback - SoftApService.SoftApDeviceInfoCallback
        errorCallback - Will be called when unexpected error happened.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - Will be thrown in case when incorrect parameter is passed.

      • getSoftApService

        public static SoftApService getSoftApService()

      • identifyYourself

        public void identifyYourself(@NonNull
                             android.content.Context context,
                             @NonNull
                             SoftApService.SoftApIdentificationCallback callback,
                             @NonNull
                             com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.CommonErrorCallback errorCallback)
        Optional method to have the device perform some identifying action, such as flashing a light or playing a sound.
        Parameters:
        context - Application context.
        callback - Will be called when identification request will be sent
        errorCallback - Will be called when unexpected error happened.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - Will be thrown in case when incorrect parameter is passed.

      • leaveSoftApNetwork

        public void leaveSoftApNetwork(@NonNull
                               android.content.Context context,
                               @NonNull
                               java.lang.String softApSsid,
                               int previousWifiNetworkId,
                               @NonNull
                               SoftApService.InternetConnectionCallback callback)
        Disconnects from the soft ap network and rejoins previous network to reconnect to the internet.
        Parameters:
        context - Application context.
        softApSsid - Soft AP SSID of the device.
        previousWifiNetworkId - ID of the WiFi network which user's phone/tablet has been previously connected to.
        callback - SoftApService.InternetConnectionCallback
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - Will be thrown in case when incorrect parameter is passed.

      • putPrivateCredentialsViaSoftAp

        public void putPrivateCredentialsViaSoftAp(boolean isHiddenNetwork,
                                           int previousWifiNetworkId,
                                           int priority,
                                           @NonNull
                                           android.content.Context context,
                                           @NonNull
                                           java.lang.String softApSsid,
                                           @NonNull
                                           com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.net.model.WiFiNetwork selectedNetwork,
                                           @NonNull
                                           java.lang.String preSharedKey,
                                           @NonNull
                                           SoftApService.SoftApCredentialsSenderCallback callback,
                                           @NonNull
                                           com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.CommonErrorCallback errorCallback)
        Sends credentials via Soft AP and starts to check joining status to see if the device has successfully joined the private network.
        Parameters:
        isHiddenNetwork - true if you want to connect device to hidden network.
        previousWifiNetworkId - ID of the WiFi network which user's phone/tablet has been previously connected to. (This is so that the phone/tablet can rejoin the previous network when the softAP network goes away.)
        priority - Network priority. Priority value should be between 150 and 255.
        context - Application context.
        softApSsid - Soft AP SSID of the device.
        selectedNetwork - WiFiNetwork object that contains all required info about selected network.
        preSharedKey - preSharedKey of desired network which you want to connect your device.
        callback - SoftApService.SoftApCredentialsSenderCallback
        errorCallback - Will be called when unexpected error happened.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - Will be thrown in case when incorrect parameter is passed.

      • setProgressView

        public SoftApService setProgressView(com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.CirrentProgressView customProgressView)
        This method allows to set a custom progress view that will be shown during requests execution.
        Parameters:
        customProgressView - Custom progress view object that implements CirrentProgressView interface.
        Returns:
        SoftApService instance.

      • setSoftApConnectTimings

        public SoftApService setSoftApConnectTimings(int softApConnectDelay,
                                             int softApConnectMaxRetryCount)
        This method changes the number of retries and the delay between retries (in seconds) when user's phone/tablet tries to connect to device via Soft AP.
        Parameters:
        softApConnectDelay - Delay between attempts.
        softApConnectMaxRetryCount - Maximum amount of retries.
        Returns:
        SoftApService instance.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - Will be thrown in case when incorrect parameter is passed.

      • setSoftApDeviceStatusTimings

        public SoftApService setSoftApDeviceStatusTimings(int softApDeviceStatusDelay,
                                                  int softApDeviceStatusMaxRequestCount)
        This method changes the number of retries and the delay between retries (in seconds) when user's phone/tablet checks device joining status via Soft AP.
        Parameters:
        softApDeviceStatusDelay - Delay between attempts.
        softApDeviceStatusMaxRequestCount - Maximum amount of requests.
        Returns:
        SoftApService instance.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - Will be thrown in case when incorrect parameter is passed.

      • setSoftApDisconnectTimings

        public SoftApService setSoftApDisconnectTimings(int softApDisconnectDelay,
                                                int softApDisconnectMaxRetryCount)
        This method changes the number of retries and the delay between retries (in seconds) when user's phone/tablet tries to disconnect from Soft AP device network.
        Parameters:
        softApDisconnectDelay - Delay between attempts.
        softApDisconnectMaxRetryCount - Maximum amount of retries.
        Returns:
        SoftApService instance.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - Will be thrown in case when incorrect parameter is passed.

      • setSoftApPort

        public SoftApService setSoftApPort(int port)
        This method changes default SoftAP port. The SoftAP port in the app must match the softAP port on the device.
        Parameters:
        port - 80 by default.
        Returns:
        SoftApService instance.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - Will be thrown in case when incorrect parameter is passed.
